  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:

  Log:
  - Fix X11 libraries dependency handling: this is a better fix to ports/153198

  - Cosmetic change
  
  PR:             ports/162649
  Reported by:    Jeremie Le Hen <jeremie@le-hen.org>

  Feature safe:   yes
